name: Goat Cheese and Sun-Dried Tomato Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sun-dried tomatoes, minced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheeses and butter in a bowl and beat until well blended and fluffy.
2. Line an 8-inch cake pan with dampened cheesecloth, leaving extra to fold over the top.
3. Layer one third of the cheese mixture in the bottom.
4. Spread half of the pesto over it.
5. Repeat with remaining cheese and pesto.
6. Cover with minced tomatoes.
7. Place plastic wrap over the top and fold the cheesecloth over it.
8. Refrigerate for at least an hour to firm up.
9. When ready, remove cheesecloth and plastic wrap.
10. Invert the torte onto a serving plate and serve with assorted crackers.
